visual_anchor: Right-side hero system object balanced by a left headline stack.
layout_rules: Make the hero object a primary zone, not a decorative accessory.
Reserve the left side for a disciplined headline stack and compact metadata.
Avoid introducing multiple secondary blocks that compete with the focal anchor.
alignment_rules: All text elements align to one left grid.
The hero object sits inside a stable right-side frame with controlled padding.
Metadata and signal labels should align with the headline grid, not float independently.

image_usage.placement_guidance: Use a large right-side image or SVG anchor that immediately establishes premium visual weight.

highlight_grammar: Keep the headline mostly neutral and high contrast.
Use accent color for small labels or orbital details.
Confine glow and gradient energy to the hero anchor zone.
anti_patterns: Tiny hero image with oversized empty space.
Multiple equal cards on a cover slide.
Accent colors scattered across unrelated elements.
reuse_notes: Best used when the deck needs an immediate premium first impression.
Adapt the hero object to the topic, but preserve the one-anchor composition.
